reviews.review_msg: Excellent Prof.  Such a teacher heart!!!!
No Comments
She is very patient with studends.  One of the best instructor I have ever had!
She is great!  I like her because she is so willing to help!
bad accent, bad teaching method, bad bad bad!!! too much notes, hard final...unclear lectures, bad writings....
Good prof!
Good prof. Recommended
She'll make you taking notes through the whole semester. Very unclear lecture!!
For a couple months after that course I still kept wanting to say 'suplieded' instead of 'supplied'
she is very nice and helpful.  her notes are a bit long but they are good.

her speaking is not very clear, but it is fine, cos you can just read the notes and ignore what she is saying. her note is very very clear. she is nice and helpful, exams are not easy but fair. it is econ 103 which is not supposed to be hard, so it's fine

this prof is unclear, can't speak clear or understandable english, has HORRIBLE grammar in her notes + misses out words in her sentences, kills you with her note taking + kills u further w/ her midterms + exams.  AVOID AT ALL COSTS.  for real.
She is all about note-taking. Quite helpful tho. Exams are okay, be prepared and you will be fine.
She is easy, nice and helpful after class, but her teaching style is intolerable: way too much unnecessary lecture notes. An average lecturer at best.

Relatively young and better looking, responsive to email queries, easy and clear exams.  She is pretty much the only person who can hear the lecturer, but she make that up with tons of notes.  Textbook for geeks only, laptop/typewriter is a must.

YEA, it's the hardest exam i have ever had. She uses the simple, stupid examples from the text, but she makes extreme hard questions on the exam. Although the concepts are similar, she never goes over questions like those in the class. It's like a trap!
easy
it's a easy course ... just read her notes----that's basicly everything u need to do to get an A.
Good looking but tough to understand.
final is extremely hard. There many many questions on the final that are totally unexpected even for a well-prepared student.
No Comments

bad english, bad grammer, "teaches" word-for-word out of the text, refuses to help when she mades office hour posting mistakes, final is nothing like what she assigns/looks over, and overall TO BE AVOIDED!
Just cann't stress how bad her teaching ability is!!!!....."Go home and retire, Vivan..." And stop making us so miserable
aww look at all them sad faces...but ya she sucks.  Her eng sucks, teaching is pretty bad..so avoid her.
terrible, can't understand what she says half the time
writes too fast, maybe even faster than a typewriter.
she goes too fast.
Writes way too fast and hard to understand.
Poor her.

1. Ta's need straightening out, whats with their marking/teaching 2. she needs to teach using different examples than the book. 3. learn to communicate 4. tests are horrible 5. she rather stick to time schedule than care if we learn material..hmm..

the strongest, fobbiest, annoying chinese accent. notes are unorganized. many students will agree that she has really messy writing. she writes too fast, therefore, all i do is catch up on her notes but don't have enough time to take in the information.
I guess she will be the worest prof. I'll ever have to encounter in my entire university career. Just can tell you how bad her teaching ability is. Why would SFU employe someone like her?
Midterm is okay, but her teaching ability is a problem. I guess a person who doesnt know Economics can be my professor. Fang just copied what the book is talking about.
Her exams are bad cause the TA's are inconsistent markers and mark horribly bad!!! But her notes are awesome. You go through 6 loose leafs in 2hrs :S. That's 12 pages of notes in 2 hrs!!!
Her voice is too high pitched and squeaky. She's the type of prof whose notes are pretty much a paraphrase of the text, so just read the text and you don't have to come to lecture.
Notes in class are disorganized
No Comments
Too angry.
Willing to help you out.  Notes are easy to understand.  Midterms are tricky but still is passable.
Very good teacher, and straight forward notes.  Enjoyable class.
Clear notes, but can't listen to her because of her non-stop note writting.
Can I be an Econ instructor instead?
good notes, non stop copying notes distracts u from hearing what she says.
She is a very nice instructor, but the exams are a bit tricky!!
Hot & Sexy, easy to follow the class! Youngest professor I've seen.
straight forward. easy quiz
